results.title: Ogun assembly moves to resolve Ijebu East land dispute, urges peaceful coexistence
results.description: The Ogun State House of Assembly has intervened in a land dispute involving Helici Bio Trade Limited, the Adekerunmi Adesada Family of Igbooye, and the Orijeru of Igbooye, Oba Abdulrasaq Akanni Musa, with a call for peaceful resolution and cooperation among parties. The post Ogun assembly moves to resolve Ijebu East land dispute, urges peaceful coexistence appeared first on Tribune Online .

results.title: Japan's Kiuchi hopes BoJ will keep cooperating with government on fighting deflation
results.description: Japan's Economy Minister, Minoru Kiuchi, said on Tuesday that long-term rates are determined by markets through diverse factors, including supply-demand and steady economic recovery.

results.title: Telecel Foundation Healthfest extends healthcare service to Konongo for Ashanti Month
results.description: About 400 people received free health screening during Telecel Foundation’s Healthfest in Konongo About 400 residents of Konongo and surrounding towns have received free, comprehensive health screenings through Telecel Ghana Foundation’s Healthfest, which brought essential healthcare services directly to residents in eastern Ashanti. The health outreach, which forms part of Telecel Ashanti Month this June, [...] The post Telecel Foundation Healthfest extends healthcare service to Konongo for Ashanti Month appeared first on Ghana News Online .

results.title: Locally grown produce program targets growing need among seniors
